channel.title: Choria Async Jobs :: Choria Configuration Manager
channel.description: Introduction This is an Asynchronous Job Queue system that relies on NATS JetStream for storage and general job life cycle management. It is compatible with any NATS JetStream based system like a private hosted JetStream, Choria Streams or a commercial SaaS. Each Task is stored in JetStream by a unique ID and Work Queue item is made referencing that Task. JetStream will handle dealing with scheduling, retries, acknowledgements and more of the Work Queue item. The stored Task will be updated during the lifecycle.
